items.caption: A smartphone displaying a barcode scanning application. the app is open, with a barcode scanner interface visible on the screen. the barcode is being scanned, and the phone is connected to a cellular network, as indicated by the signal strength and time displayed at the top of the screen. the phone is black, and the screen is displaying a white background with a green checkmark, suggesting a successful scan. the barcode itself is a standard 13-digit ean-13, which is commonly used for retail products. the text "barcode scanner" is visible at the top of the screen, and there is a code number at the bottom, which is likely the reference number for the product being scanned. a digital rendering or a photograph of a real-life scenario.
